That hundred-dollar swing matters because it lifts the value score enough to keep DJI on top despite Insta360 closing the optical gap. The Ace Pro 2 is parked at $429 and remains the better grab for low-light hikers and creators who want the 8K oversample. GoPro Mission 1 Pro held its $599 introductory promo through the weekend, and I am keeping it third because the new Hypersmooth Pro really is the most usable stabilization I have tested in 2026 on mountain bike footage. The Hero13 Black at $329 is the Sunday sweet spot for first-time buyers, and the bundles with the Enduro battery are still in stock at B&H. Insta360 X5 stayed at $499 the entire weekend, which signals Insta360 is more interested in unit share than margin right now, and that pricing is structural. Down the list, the original Action 5 Pro at $279 is the value chase if you can live without variable aperture. Akaso Brave 7 LE at $99 closes the budget gap. Tuesday morning resets the GoPro Mission 1 Pro to $699, so if you have been on the fence, the Sunday window is the move. Inventory at the discount price is what runs out first.

en.commentary: Friday afternoon and the post-Memorial Day reset has played out exactly how I expected. DJI quietly let the Osmo Action 6 slide back to $429 at most US retailers as of Wednesday, and B&H and Adorama are now matching at $419 ahead of the Father's Day window opening next week. That is still strong enough to keep DJI on top because the variable aperture and 1/1.1-inch sensor have no real rival at this number, and the Father's Day inventory build means buyers will not see another meaningful cut until late June. Insta360 Ace Pro 2 holds second at $449 with the Leica-engineered lens and 8K30 oversample, and I have been shooting trail running footage with it all week. The low-light advantage over the DJI is genuine once the sun drops below the tree line, which is the relevant test for summer hikes. GoPro Mission 1 Pro stays third at $649 after the post-holiday lift, and the Hypersmooth Pro stabilization is still my top recommendation for anyone planning bike park sessions or motorcycle touring in June. Hero13 Black at $349 is the clean Father's Day gift if Dad is new to the category, and the Creator Edition bundle is in stock at GoPro.com. Insta360 X5 at $549 holds fifth and the 360-capture workflow has matured enough that I no longer treat it as a niche pick. Down the list, the Osmo Action 5 Pro at $299 is the value chase for second cameras and B-roll rigs, while Akaso Brave 7 LE at $99 is the kid-camera answer for summer family trips. references.title: Best action camera to buy in 2026: GoPro, DJI, Insta360 and more

The best action cameras in 2026: capture life's adventures

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, DJI Osmo Action 6 holds the top position in action cameras and the case is clear. The Osmo Action 6 is the first mainstream action camera to feature a true 1-inch sensor, which changes the competitive landscape in low-light and dynamic range performance. 8K30 recording gives creators headroom to crop and reframe in post without losing 4K output quality. DJI's RockSteady 4.0 stabilization retains battery charge longer than competitor stabilization implementations, and the dual-screen design means solo operators can frame shots without camera crew. For outdoor enthusiasts heading into the summer adventure season, the Osmo Action 6 is the correct top pick.

Insta360 Ace Pro 2 holds second at $399, co-engineered with Leica optics, and it excels specifically in dark environments. The Leica-tuned sensor delivers low-light performance that outperforms the DJI Osmo Action 6 in nighttime settings, making it the right recommendation for creators who shoot at dawn, dusk, or indoor extreme sports. The AI horizon leveling keeps the frame perfectly level even in chaotic motion.

GoPro Mission 1 Pro holds third with the best stabilization in the group via HyperSmooth 7.0. The Mission 1 Pro handles high-frequency vibration from motorcycles and mountain bikes better than any competing stabilization system, and GoPro's Quik app ecosystem and accessory library is the largest in the action camera market. For creators already invested in GoPro mounts and accessories, Mission 1 Pro is the correct upgrade path.

GoPro Hero 13 Black holds fourth as the most accessible GoPro option. Insta360 X5 holds fifth for 360-degree capture at 8K resolution.

highlights.body: The first mainstream action camera with a true 1-inch sensor delivers a dynamic range and low-light performance advantage that competitors with smaller sensors cannot close. 8K30 gives post-production flexibility, and RockSteady 4.0 handles stabilization efficiently. For the summer adventure season, Osmo Action 6 is the top recommendation.

highlights.title: Insta360 Ace Pro 2 is the low-light specialist with Leica optics
highlights.body: Leica-tuned sensor outperforms the DJI Osmo Action 6 specifically in nighttime and low-light environments. For creators who shoot dawn expeditions, sunset sessions, or indoor extreme sports, the Ace Pro 2's low-light advantage makes it the correct choice despite the DJI's larger sensor.

highlights.title: GoPro Mission 1 Pro is the stabilization champion for high-vibration sports
highlights.body: HyperSmooth 7.0 handles motorcycle and mountain bike high-frequency vibration better than any competing system. For creators already in the GoPro ecosystem with existing mounts and accessories, Mission 1 Pro is the correct upgrade path and the largest accessory ecosystem extends its long-term value.

references.title: Sorry GoPro, the DJI Osmo Action 6 just won the action camera war
DJI Osmo Action 6 vs GoPro Hero 13 Black - for night it's no contest
Best Action Camera 2026: DJI vs GoPro vs Insta360

en.commentary: The DJI Osmo Action 6 keeps the top spot, and after another week of comparisons I am more convinced than ever. That 1/1.1-inch square sensor with a variable f/2.0 to f/4.0 aperture is the real story here. It pulls roughly 13.5 stops of dynamic range and holds clean detail once the sun drops, which is exactly where most action cameras fall apart. At around 436 dollars on Amazon it asks for a premium, but you get 20 meters of waterproofing with no case and a battery that runs close to four hours of real shooting. For anyone filming dives, ski runs, or night rides, this is the camera I hand them first. The interesting wrinkle this week is GoPro. The Hero 14 Black is confirmed for a late April 2026 launch with a new 5nm GP3 processor, a 1-inch sensor, 8K30 capture, and HyperSmooth 7.0 with AI prediction. That is GoPro's biggest hardware leap since 2021, and it could shake up positions two through four once units ship and get tested. For now I am holding the order steady because real-world footage beats spec sheets every time. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 stays my number two for its Leica color science and strong low-light handling, and the GoPro Mission 1 Pro keeps third on the strength of its stabilization. The Hero 13 Black remains a fine buy at 419 dollars if you live inside the GoPro modular ecosystem, but its 1/1.9-inch sensor shows grain after dark. My advice: if you shoot daytime adventure, any of the top five will serve you well, and if low light matters, the Action 6 is the safest money you can spend right now.

zh-tw.commentary: DJI Osmo Action 6 這週繼續穩坐冠軍，老實說我看了一輪比較之後更服氣了。它那顆 1/1.1 吋的方形感光元件，加上 f/2.0 到 f/4.0 的可變光圈，才是真正的關鍵。動態範圍大概有 13.5 級，太陽一下山照樣壓得住雜訊，這正是大多數運動相機會翻車的地方。台灣水貨大概落在台幣一萬三上下，價格確實不算親民，可是免防水殼就能下潛 20 公尺，實拍續航又能撐到接近四小時，對於玩潛水、滑雪、夜騎的人，我第一個就推它。這週比較有看頭的是 GoPro。Hero 14 Black 已經確定 2026 年四月底登場，換上 5nm 的 GP3 處理器、一吋感光元件、8K30 錄影，還有加上 AI 預測的 HyperSmooth 7.0。這是 GoPro 從 2021 年以來最大的硬體升級，等實機上市測完，第二到第四名很可能會洗牌。不過我現在還是先按兵不動，畢竟實拍畫面永遠比規格表可靠。Insta360 Ace Pro 2 靠著徠卡調色跟不錯的低光表現，繼續守住第二。GoPro Mission 1 Pro 靠防穩排第三。Hero 13 Black 台幣一萬二左右還是不錯，前提是你已經在 GoPro 模組生態裡，但那顆 1/1.9 吋感光元件入夜後雜訊就很明顯。我的建議很簡單，白天拍冒險，前五名隨便挑都好用。在意低光，現在最穩的選擇就是 Action 6。

references.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 review: Better than anything GoPro or Insta360 can offer
Insta360 Ace Pro 2 vs DJI Osmo Action 6 (2026)
Insta360 X6 leak hints at imminent launch – could the updated camera fix the X5's biggest weakness?

en.commentary:
The DJI Osmo Action 6 holds rank 1 because it does the thing every action camera buyer actually wants: more capability for less money. Tom's Guide calls it better than anything GoPro or Insta360 can offer, and the spec sheet backs that up. It shoots 8K, survives down to -20C and up to 45C, is waterproof to 20m, and ships with 50GB of built-in storage. The square sensor lets you frame 1:1 and crop to horizontal or vertical after the fact, which is genuinely useful for anyone posting to both YouTube and vertical feeds. And it starts at just $369 for the Essential Combo. That price-to-capability ratio is why it leads.

The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 at rank 2 was the first action camera to hit 8K, and it remains the choice for low-light shooters thanks to its larger sensor and Leica color science. Side-by-side comparisons through early 2026 show it trading blows with the Action 6, so the gap at the top is genuinely close.

The GoPro Mission 1 Pro at rank 3 and Hero 13 Black at rank 4 keep GoPro relevant for buyers locked into its mounting ecosystem and editing app. The Insta360 X5 at rank 5 is the 360-degree powerhouse, and worth flagging: a leaked X6 hints at an imminent launch that could fix the X5's weak points, so 360 buyers may want to wait or watch for X5 discounts.

My verdict stands: the Action 6 is the action camera to buy in 2026, the Ace Pro 2 is the low-light alternative, and the X-series is where you go for immersive 360 capture.

references.title: Best action camera to buy in 2026
The best action cameras in 2026
Best Action Camera 2026: DJI vs GoPro vs Insta360

en.commentary: The action camera race in 2026 is genuinely close, and that's reflected in how tight my top three is. The DJI Osmo Action 6 makes the strongest technical argument right now thanks to its true one-inch sensor and 8K30 recording, which gives it a low-light and detail advantage that's hard to ignore. GoPro's HERO13 Black keeps its case as the best all-rounder, mostly on stabilization. HyperSmooth 7.0 still handles high-frequency vibration better than anything else, which is exactly what you want on a motorcycle mount or a mountain bike trail, and DJI is close but GoPro edges it in pure smoothness. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2, co-engineered with Leica, is the one I reach for in the dark. It impressed reviewers most in low light and it also has the cleanest onboard audio of the bunch, where DJI is balanced and GoPro tends to compress voices a touch. For anyone shooting reframed or 360 footage, the Insta360 X5 remains in a category of its own. It's pricier than a standard action cam but the 360 capture opens up creative options that flat sensors simply can't match, and it's the travel-vlog tool I'd recommend without hesitation. The pattern this week is that each camera has carved out a clear lane: DJI for sensor and resolution, GoPro for stabilization and rugged reliability, Insta360 for low light, audio, and 360. None of that shifts the order I've been running, so the board stays as is today. Buy to the strength that matches your actual shooting, that's the real takeaway.

highlights.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 makes the sensor argument
highlights.body: A true one-inch sensor and 8K30 recording give the Action 6 a real edge in detail and low-light capture. For creators who care most about image quality and resolution headroom, it's the most compelling pick of the year, which is why it sits at the top of the technical conversation this week.

highlights.title: GoPro HERO13 Black wins on stabilization
highlights.body: HyperSmooth 7.0 still leads the field at taming high-frequency vibration, making the HERO13 the camera to trust on a motorcycle or mountain-bike mount. DJI runs close, but GoPro keeps the smoothness crown, and its rugged reliability backs up the footage.

highlights.title: Insta360 owns low light and 360
highlights.body: The Leica co-engineered Ace Pro 2 impressed most in dark scenes and has the cleanest onboard audio here. For immersive and reframed footage the X5 stands alone, and while it costs more, its 360 capture unlocks creative options flat-sensor cameras can't touch.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 的運動相機戰真的打很兇，這也反映在我前三名咬得超緊。DJI Osmo Action 6 目前技術帳面最硬，靠的是真一吋感光元件加 8K30 錄影，低光跟細節的優勢很難忽視。GoPro HERO13 Black 守住全能王的位子，主要贏在防手震。HyperSmooth 7.0 處理高頻震動還是同級最好，這正是你掛在機車或越野車上最需要的，DJI 很接近但純論滑順度 GoPro 還是略勝。Insta360 Ace Pro 2 跟 Leica 合作調校，是我在暗處會直接拿出來的那台，評測在低光環境表現最突出，內建收音也是這群裡最乾淨的，DJI 算均衡，GoPro 講話聲音容易被壓掉一點。要拍重構鏡頭或 360 的話，Insta360 X5 自己一個級別。它比一般運動相機貴，但 360 捕捉開出的創意空間是平面感光元件給不了的，旅遊 vlog 我會毫不猶豫推它。這週的態勢就是每台都站穩自己的賽道：DJI 拚感光元件跟解析度，GoPro 拚防手震跟耐操可靠，Insta360 拚低光、收音跟 360。這些都沒有動到我跑的順序，所以今天榜單照舊。照你實際拍攝需求挑強項買，這才是重點。

highlights.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 主打感光元件
highlights.body: 真一吋感光元件加 8K30 錄影，讓 Action 6 在細節跟低光捕捉上真的有優勢。對最在意畫質跟解析度餘裕的創作者來說，它是今年最有說服力的選擇，這也是它這禮拜站上技術討論頂端的原因。

highlights.title: GoPro HERO13 Black 防手震稱王

highlights.title: Insta360 拿下低光與 360
highlights.body: Leica 合作調校的 Ace Pro 2 在暗場景最突出，內建收音也是這裡最乾淨的。沉浸式跟重構鏡頭方面 X5 自成一格，雖然貴一點，但它的 360 捕捉解鎖了平面感光元件碰不到的創意空間。

references.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 review: Better than anything GoPro or Insta360 can offer
Best Action Camera 2026: DJI vs GoPro vs Insta360

en.commentary:
The DJI Osmo Action 6 holds first, and Tom's Guide's verdict says it plainly: this is better than anything GoPro or Insta360 can offer right now. The headline is the true 1-inch sensor, the first in this form factor, paired with 8K30 recording. In stress testing it ran 120 minutes at 4K60 and 93 minutes flat out at 8K30, which is best-in-class endurance, and the Essential Combo starts at $369, undercutting GoPro's flagship while outperforming it. The 1-inch sensor is the reason it pulls ahead on both detail and low light.

The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 holds second and stays the pick for anyone who shoots at night. It rendered the cleanest streetlight detail in low-light testing and carries the clearest onboard audio in the category, which matters for vloggers who care about voice as much as picture. The GoPro Mission 1 Pro holds third on the strength of its stabilization, still the most locked-down image under hard vibration.

The GoPro Hero 13 Black holds fourth as the rider's camera, the one that stays usable under extreme motorcycle vibration, and the Insta360 X5 stays fifth as the best 360 cam in 2026 for the creator who reframes in post. Below them the Osmo Action 5 Pro holds the value-flagship slot, the GoPro Max 2 covers 360 for the GoPro ecosystem, and the DJI Osmo 360 at tenth remains a genuinely strong dual-lens option punching above its rank on battery and value. The Hero 2024 and Akaso Brave 7 LE round out the budget end. The order is unchanged this week. DJI owns the top on sensor size and endurance, Insta360 owns low light and 360, and GoPro owns the high-vibration mounts.

highlights.title: The DJI Osmo Action 6 is the best action camera you can buy
highlights.body: The true 1-inch sensor, a first in this form factor, is the reason it leads on both detail and low light. It records 8K30, ran 120 minutes at 4K60 and 93 minutes at full 8K30 in stress testing, and the Essential Combo starts at $369. That undercuts GoPro's flagship while beating it on image quality. Tom's Guide calls it better than anything GoPro or Insta360 can offer, and the bench backs that up.

highlights.title: The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 is the camera for night shooters
highlights.body: It rendered the cleanest streetlight detail of any camera in low-light testing, and it carries the clearest onboard audio in the category. For the vlogger or night rider whose footage lives after sunset, the Ace Pro 2 is the one to buy. It trails the Action 6 only on raw stabilization and sensor size, and for low-light work it is genuinely the better tool.

highlights.title: The GoPro Hero 13 Black is still the rider's camera
highlights.body: GoPro's stabilization stays the most locked-down image under extreme vibration, which is exactly what a motorcycle or mountain-bike mount demands. The Hero 13 Black is the camera I hand to riders over the higher-ranked DJI, because on a vibrating handlebar the stabilization margin is the whole game and GoPro still owns it.

highlights.title: The Insta360 X5 is the best 360 camera in 2026
highlights.body: For the creator who shoots everything and reframes in post, the X5 leads the 360 category. Capture the full sphere, pick your shot later, and let the software find the angle. It is the most flexible way to film fast action where you cannot point a camera in real time, and it stays ahead of the GoPro Max 2 on image quality.

zh-tw.commentary:
DJI Osmo Action 6 守第一，Tom's Guide 的結論講得很直白，現在這台比 GoPro 跟 Insta360 任何一台都好。重點是這個尺寸第一次塞進真正的 1 吋感光元件，搭配 8K30 錄影。壓力測試 4K60 跑 120 分鐘、全力 8K30 跑 93 分鐘，續航是同級最強，Essential Combo 約台幣一萬一起跳，價格壓過 GoPro 旗艦還打得更好。1 吋感光元件就是它在細節跟弱光雙雙領先的原因。

GoPro Hero 13 Black 守第四，是騎士的相機，機車劇烈震動下還能用的就是它。Insta360 X5 守第五，是 2026 最佳 360 相機，適合後製重新取景的創作者。下面 Osmo Action 5 Pro 守 CP 值旗艦位、GoPro Max 2 顧 GoPro 生態的 360，DJI Osmo 360 排第十，還是很強的雙鏡頭選擇，續航跟 CP 值都打得比排名高。Hero 2024 跟 Akaso Brave 7 LE 收尾預算端。這禮拜排序沒動。DJI 靠感光元件大小跟續航拿下頂端，Insta360 拿弱光跟 360，GoPro 拿高震動掛載。

highlights.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 是現在能買到最好的運動相機
highlights.body: 這個尺寸第一次有真正的 1 吋感光元件，就是它細節跟弱光雙雙領先的原因。能錄 8K30，壓力測試 4K60 跑 120 分鐘、全力 8K30 跑 93 分鐘，Essential Combo 約台幣一萬一起跳，價格壓過 GoPro 旗艦還打得更好。Tom's Guide 說它比 GoPro 跟 Insta360 任何一台都好，實測也撐得起這句話。

highlights.body: 弱光測試裡它把路燈細節拍得最乾淨，內建收音也是同級最清楚。日落後才開拍的 vlogger 或夜騎族就買這台。它只在純防震跟感光元件大小輸 Action 6，論弱光它真的是更好的工具。

highlights.body: 什麼都拍、後製再重新取景的創作者，X5 是 360 品類第一。拍下整顆球，事後再選鏡位，讓軟體找角度。拍那種來不及實時對準的快速動作，這是最靈活的方式，畫質也還是壓過 GoPro Max 2。

Add four-hour battery life and 20m waterproofing with no case and you have the camera I reach for on real trips. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 stays second for low-light and vlogging, where its 8K30 capture and Leica optics pull ahead of everyone for talking-to-camera work. The GoPro Mission 1 Pro holds third on the strength of HyperSmooth stabilization, which remains the smoothest footage I can get on a bike or a trail. For 360 shooters the Insta360 X5 is still the one to beat, and the DJI Osmo 360 keeps closing the gap on battery and value. There is real news on the horizon, GoPro's HERO14 Black is confirmed for a spring launch with a new GP3 chip, a 1-inch sensor, and 8K30, which could reshuffle the GoPro tier once it actually ships. It is not here yet, so I held every rank and score steady this week rather than pricing in a camera nobody can test. If you are buying today, the Action 6 is the safe call, and only hold off if you specifically want that upcoming GoPro flagship.

For 360 capture, the Insta360 X5 stays the one to beat, and the DJI Osmo 360 remains a strong, well-priced alternative. The lineup is mature right now, so beyond that value shift I am holding the order steady.

en.commentary: The DJI Osmo Action 6 keeps my top spot this week, and the news cycle confirms it is built on the strongest foundation in the category. The interesting story right now is what comes next. Insta360 has officially announced Luna, a dual-camera handheld system clearly aimed at the compact gimbal space, and GoPro is teasing a new cinematic camera built on its GP3 processor that promises larger sensors and stronger low-light performance. Both signal an industry pushing toward bigger sensors and crossover form factors, but neither has shipped, so today's rankings stand on what you can actually buy. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 holds second with the best low-light score in the field at 9.2, thanks to its Leica-tuned optics and large sensor, making it my pick for night riders and indoor shooters. The GoPro Mission 1 Pro stays third for its class-leading 9.3 stabilization, the gold standard for handheld and helmet footage. For 360 capture, the Insta360 X5 and DJI Osmo 360 remain the two to weigh, with the X5 leading on resolution and the Osmo 360 offering better value at an 8.2 score. Rankings are unchanged. zh-tw.commentary: 2026 夏天過了一半，我手邊最常抓起來拍的還是 DJI Osmo Action 6，這張榜單龍頭穩得住，是因為硬體真的撐得起來。那顆貨真價實的 1 吋感光元件加上可變光圈，弱光的寬容度目前其他家還在追，我在傍晚水邊實拍過，別台這時候畫面就糊成一片，它坐第一是靠實力。Insta360 Ace Pro 2 緊跟在後也有它的道理，Leica 鏡頭在暗場真的能把細節拉出來，所以我會推薦給那種拍到天黑還在錄的單人 vlog 玩家。GoPro Mission 1 Pro 五月底出貨，配 50MP 的 1 吋感光元件，這週穩在第三，看起來就是 GoPro 想做的那台耐操日常機，招牌防手震也還在。360 這邊 Insta360 X5 一樣做它最拿手的事，雙大感光元件拍 8K 全景，想事後重新構圖的人我還是遞這台給他。這週我沒有動排名。過去七天沒有東西真的撼動順序，與其硬擠出變化，我寧可讓榜單維持誠實跟穩定。今天要買，就照你的光線挑：想要最寬容錄影選 Osmo Action 6，做內容選 Ace Pro 2，要沉浸式全景就 X5。

highlights.title: Osmo Action 6 續坐王座
highlights.body: 1 吋感光加可變光圈，弱光畫面是我拍過所有運動相機裡最乾淨的，第一名當之無愧。

highlights.title: Ace Pro 2 給內容創作者
highlights.body: Leica 鏡頭在暗場能把細節拉出來，天黑還在拍的單人 vlog 玩家我第一個推它。

highlights.title: GoPro Mission 1 Pro 站穩
highlights.body: 五月底上市，50MP 的 1 吋感光元件，卡在第三，是台防手震還在的耐操日常機。

highlights.title: X5 稱霸 360
highlights.body: 雙大感光元件拍 8K 全景，想事後重新構圖的人我還是推這台。

The best action cameras for 2026
The best action cameras in 2026: capture life's adventures

en.commentary: The DJI Osmo Action 6 keeps my top spot, and I am more sure of it every week. That true 1-inch sensor with 8K30 gives you detail and low-light latitude that the rest of the field still chases, and DJI wraps it in the most complete magnetic mounting ecosystem out there. For anyone shooting a mix of daylight action and dim indoor scenes, it is the safest single buy. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 holds second on the strength of its night performance, and it is still the one I hand to vloggers who film after sunset. The interesting development is GoPro finally landing a real answer. The Mission 1 Pro shipped at the end of May with a 1-inch 50MP sensor, physically the largest in any mainstream action camera, and after a few weeks of real footage I am comfortable nudging it up. GoPro's stabilization has always been elite, and now the sensor size matches the ambition. It sits third, just behind the Ace Pro 2, and the gap is narrow. Further down, the Insta360 X5 stays the pick for immersive 360 capture and the DJI Osmo 360 keeps closing on it for value. If your budget is tight, the Hero 2024 still shoots clean daylight video for short money. This category is in a genuinely strong place. Three brands are pushing sensor size and stabilization at once, and the buyer wins. I bumped the Mission 1 Pro to reflect weeks of confident field results.

highlights.title: Osmo Action 6 stays on top
highlights.body: True 1-inch sensor, 8K30, and the most complete magnetic mounting ecosystem. The safest single buy for mixed shooting.

highlights.title: GoPro Mission 1 Pro earns a bump
highlights.body: Shipped end of May with a 1-inch 50MP sensor, the largest in any mainstream action cam. Weeks of clean footage push it to third.

highlights.title: Ace Pro 2 owns the night
highlights.body: Still my pick for vloggers filming after sunset. Its low-light performance holds second even as GoPro closes in.

highlights.title: 360 race is heating up
highlights.body: Insta360 X5 leads immersive capture while the DJI Osmo 360 keeps closing the value gap. Good time to buy either.

zh-tw.commentary: DJI Osmo Action 6 繼續守住我的第一名，而且我一週比一週更確定。那顆真正的一吋感光元件配上 8K30，帶來的細節跟低光寬容度，其他機種到現在還在追，DJI 還把它包進市面上最完整的磁吸配件生態。對於白天動態跟昏暗室內都要拍的人，這是最保險的單一選擇。Insta360 Ace Pro 2 靠夜拍實力守住第二，日落之後才開拍的 vlogger，我還是直接推它。這次比較有意思的是 GoPro 終於端出真正的答案。Mission 1 Pro 五月底出貨，配一吋 50MP 感光元件，是主流運動相機裡實體最大的一顆，實拍幾週後我很放心把它往上調。GoPro 的防手震一直是頂尖水準，現在感光元件的尺寸終於配得上企圖心。它排第三，就在 Ace Pro 2 後面一點點，差距很小。再往下，Insta360 X5 還是沉浸式 360 拍攝的首選，DJI Osmo 360 在 CP 值上一直逼近它。預算緊的話，Hero 2024 白天畫面依然乾淨，價格又親民。這個類別現在真的很精彩，三個品牌同時在拚感光元件跟防手震，最爽的是消費者。我把 Mission 1 Pro 往上調，反映幾週下來很有把握的實拍結果。

highlights.title: Osmo Action 6 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 真一吋感光元件、8K30、最完整磁吸配件生態。混合拍攝最保險的單一選擇。

highlights.title: GoPro Mission 1 Pro 值得上調
highlights.body: 五月底出貨，一吋 50MP 感光元件，主流運動相機最大。幾週乾淨實拍把它推上第三。

highlights.title: Ace Pro 2 稱霸夜拍
highlights.body: 日落後開拍的 vlogger 我還是推它。低光表現守住第二，即使 GoPro 逼近。

highlights.title: 360 之爭升溫
highlights.body: Insta360 X5 領先沉浸式拍攝，DJI Osmo 360 持續縮小 CP 值差距。這兩台現在都是好入手時機。
